stemHtml:
You are planning a flight for 4th of December 2019 and checking the NOTAMs for the destination aerodrome Brussels (EBBR). What is the effect of the following NOTAM for the time of arrival 19:00 UTC?

Q) EDWW/QGAAU/I/NBO/A/000/999/5338N00959E030
A) EBBR
B) 1912041845
C) 1912042045
E) EGNOS IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR LPV

options.a: You won't be affected at the time of arrival.
options.b: You will not be able to use SBAS for LPV minima.
options.c: You can not execute 3D RNAV approaches to Hamburg due to the SBAS outage.
options.d: ABAS will be unavailable for all approaches.
